rationale: Three coherent groups of changes. (1) TypeScript fixes: `package.json` and `package-lock.json` add the missing OAuth type declarations the PR body promises (`@types/passport-discord@^0.1.15`, `@types/passport-facebook@^3.0.4`, `@types/passport-spotify@^2.0.4`, `@types/passport-twitter@^1.0.40`, plus `@types/jest@^29.5.14` and `@types/mime-types@^2.1.4`); these are the actual TS-error source for the 13 OAuth providers documented in the README. (2) `README.md` grows from one line to a comprehensive document covering architecture (Traefik → Express → MySQL/Redis/WebSocket), the 52-module table, OAuth providers, economy endpoints, payments, WebSocket events, AI brain, project structure, Docker deployment instructions, and config requirements. (3) `.github/` adds the conventional set: `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` (Contributor Covenant 2.1), `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SECURITY.md`, `FUNDING.yml`, three issue templates (bug, feature, security) plus `config.yml`, `pull_request_template.md`, `dependabot.yml` (npm/docker/github-actions), and two workflows (`ci.yml` with lint-and-typecheck, build, test, docker; `docker-publish.yml` with ghcr.io login and metadata-action). No source code is modified in the diff but the PR body and title scope is consistent with what's actually delivered.
